name: Alsatian Christmas Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg white beaten with 1 teaspoon water
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together butter, sugar, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in flour, ground almonds, cinnamon, and salt; blend well.
3. Add orange peel and mix thoroughly.
4. Cover the dough with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (about 0.25 cm) and cut shapes using Christmas cookie cutters.
7. If not using colored icing, decorate with colored sugar or sprinkles before baking.
8. Bake for 9-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Decorate with icing, colored sugars, sprinkles, etc.
10. Store the cookies airtight at room temperature for up to one week, or freeze for longer storage.
